content: Strong discovery with Talindro. Helena owns ops P&L and is clearly the champion. CFO Diane is the economic buyer. Pain quantified at ~120k/qtr chargebacks. Booked working session for the 24th. Feeling great about this one.
Commercial call landed. Agreed 58k on a 2-year term plus reference clause. Security review and legal are the only gates. Targeting signature April 15. Mutual plan sent.
Gave Crestpoint a full platform demo. Trent loved it. Champion confirmed. Just needs to loop his team. Should close this quarter.
Ridgeway is close. Karen is bought in. Minor pricing and integration questions to clear, then we sign. Champion is strong.
Intro call booked with Brightway next week. Early but looks promising.
